rationale: The score is identical (8/10) in both evaluations, and the justifications, strengths, and concerns are substantively the same — strong geospatial/GIS experience, software craftsmanship, limited recent C++, and no Rust. The wording differs (e.g., one cites 'routing tiling' specifics while the other adds an OS-concepts note), but these are ordinary run-to-run paraphrase variations, not penalties or credits tied to the candidate relocating to the United States. Nothing in the variant references the location change or any age/nationality proxy.
